xanesnet.strategies package¶

Public API for XANESNET training and inference strategies.

class xanesnet.strategies.Strategy(strategy_type, dataset, model_config, weight_init, weight_init_params, bias_init, checkpoint_dir, checkpoint_interval, tensorboard_dir, trainer_config=None, inferencer_config=None)[source]¶

Bases: ABC

Abstract base class for training and inference strategies.

A strategy defines how one or more models are set up, trained, and used for inference (e.g. single model, ensemble, k-fold cross-validation). Subclasses must implement all abstract methods to provide concrete training and inference logic.

Raises:

  • ValueError – If neither trainer_config nor inferencer_config is provided at construction time.

  • ValueError – If both trainer_config and inferencer_config are None.

Parameters:

  • strategy_type (str) – Registry key identifying this strategy type.

  • dataset (Dataset) – The dataset used for training or inference.

  • model_config (Config) – Configuration for the model.

  • weight_init (str) – Weight initialization scheme name.

  • weight_init_params (Config) – Additional parameters passed to the weight initializer.

  • bias_init (str) – Bias initialization scheme name.

  • checkpoint_dir (str | Path | None) – Directory for saving checkpoint files, or None to disable checkpointing.

  • checkpoint_interval (int | None) – Number of epochs between checkpoints, or None to disable interval-based checkpointing.

  • tensorboard_dir (str | Path | None) – Directory for TensorBoard event files, or None to disable TensorBoard logging.

  • trainer_config (Config | None) – Configuration for the trainer. Either this or inferencer_config must be provided.

  • inferencer_config (Config | None) – Configuration for the inferencer. Either this or trainer_config must be provided.

__init__(strategy_type, dataset, model_config, weight_init, weight_init_params, bias_init, checkpoint_dir, checkpoint_interval, tensorboard_dir, trainer_config=None, inferencer_config=None)[source]¶

Initialize shared strategy state.

abstractmethod setup_models()[source]¶

Instantiate the models used by this strategy.

Must be called before init_model_weights, setup_trainers, or setup_inferencers.

Return type:

None

abstractmethod init_model_weights()[source]¶

Apply weight and bias initialization to the strategy’s models.

Must be called after setup_models.

Return type:

None

abstractmethod set_state_dicts(state_dicts)[source]¶

Load model state dicts from a list of previously saved dicts.

Parameters:

state_dicts (list[dict]) – List of state dictionaries, one per model managed by this strategy.

Return type:

None

abstractmethod setup_trainers(device)[source]¶

Instantiate the trainers used by this strategy.

Must be called after setup_models and setup_checkpointer.

Parameters:

device (str | device) – The device on which training will be performed (e.g. "cpu" or "cuda").

Return type:

None

abstractmethod run_training()[source]¶

Execute the training loop and return the trained models.

The base implementation logs the run start and returns an empty list. Subclasses must call super().run_training() and then return their trained models.

Return type:

list[Model]

Returns:

List of trained Model instances.

abstractmethod setup_inferencers(device)[source]¶

Instantiate the inferencers used by this strategy.

Must be called after setup_models.

Parameters:

device (str | device) – The device on which inference will be performed.

Return type:

None

abstractmethod run_inference(predictions_save_path)[source]¶

Execute inference and optionally save predictions.

The base implementation logs the run start. Subclasses must call super().run_inference(predictions_save_path).

Parameters:

predictions_save_path (str | Path | None) – Directory in which to write prediction output, or None to skip saving.

Return type:

None

setup_checkpointer()[source]¶

Instantiate the Checkpointer for this strategy.

Must be called after setup_models because the checkpointer is initialized with self.model_signature.

Return type:

None

abstract property model_signature: Config¶

Return the model’s configuration as a Config.

Returns:

A Config representing the model’s configuration signature.

abstract property signature: Config¶

Return the full strategy configuration as a Config.

The base implementation returns a Config containing only the strategy_type key. Subclasses should call super().signature and extend the result.

Returns:

A Config capturing the strategy configuration.

class xanesnet.strategies.Bootstrap(strategy_type, dataset, model_config, weight_init, weight_init_params, bias_init, checkpoint_dir, checkpoint_interval, tensorboard_dir, trainer_config=None, inferencer_config=None)[source]¶

Bases: Strategy

Bootstrap ensemble strategy.

Note

Not yet implemented. TODO: implement bootstrap sampling for model ensembling.

Parameters:

  • strategy_type (str) – Strategy identifier.

  • dataset (Dataset) – Dataset used for training or inference.

  • model_config (Config) – Configuration for the model.

  • weight_init (str) – Weight initialization scheme name.

  • weight_init_params (Config) – Additional weight-initializer parameters.

  • bias_init (str) – Bias initialization scheme name.

  • checkpoint_dir (str | Path | None) – Directory for checkpoints, or None.

  • checkpoint_interval (int | None) – Epoch interval between checkpoints, or None.

  • tensorboard_dir (str | Path | None) – Directory for TensorBoard event files, or None.

  • trainer_config (Config | None) – Trainer configuration for training mode.

  • inferencer_config (Config | None) – Inferencer configuration for inference mode.

__init__(strategy_type, dataset, model_config, weight_init, weight_init_params, bias_init, checkpoint_dir, checkpoint_interval, tensorboard_dir, trainer_config=None, inferencer_config=None)[source]¶

Initialize the placeholder bootstrap strategy.

setup_models()[source]¶

Raise because bootstrap model setup is not implemented.

Raises:

NotImplementedError – Always.

Return type:

None

init_model_weights()[source]¶

Raise because bootstrap weight initialization is not implemented.

Raises:

NotImplementedError – Always.

Return type:

None

set_state_dicts(state_dicts)[source]¶

Raise because bootstrap state-dict loading is not implemented.

Parameters:

state_dicts (list[dict]) – State dictionaries that would be loaded into managed models.

Raises:

NotImplementedError – Always.

Return type:

None

setup_trainers(device)[source]¶

Raise because bootstrap trainer setup is not implemented.

Parameters:

device (str | device) – Target device for training.

Raises:

NotImplementedError – Always.

Return type:

None

run_training()[source]¶

Raise because bootstrap training is not implemented.

Return type:

list[Model]

Returns:

Never returns normally.

Raises:

NotImplementedError – Always.

setup_inferencers(device)[source]¶

Raise because bootstrap inferencer setup is not implemented.

Parameters:

device (str | device) – Target device for inference.

Raises:

NotImplementedError – Always.

Return type:

None

run_inference(predictions_save_path)[source]¶

Raise because bootstrap inference is not implemented.

Parameters:

predictions_save_path (str | Path | None) – Destination directory for prediction output.

Raises:

NotImplementedError – Always.

Return type:

None

property model_signature: Config¶

Raise because bootstrap model signatures are not implemented.

Returns:

Never returns normally.

Raises:

NotImplementedError – Always.

property signature: Config¶

Return the placeholder bootstrap strategy configuration.

Returns:

A Config containing the base strategy signature only.

class xanesnet.strategies.Ensemble(strategy_type, dataset, model_config, weight_init, weight_init_params, bias_init, checkpoint_dir, checkpoint_interval, tensorboard_dir, trainer_config=None, inferencer_config=None)[source]¶

Bases: Strategy

Multi-model ensemble strategy.

Note

Not yet implemented. TODO: implement ensemble training and averaged inference.

Parameters:

  • strategy_type (str) – Strategy identifier.

  • dataset (Dataset) – Dataset used for training or inference.

  • model_config (Config) – Configuration for the model.

  • weight_init (str) – Weight initialization scheme name.

  • weight_init_params (Config) – Additional weight-initializer parameters.

  • bias_init (str) – Bias initialization scheme name.

  • checkpoint_dir (str | Path | None) – Directory for checkpoints, or None.

  • checkpoint_interval (int | None) – Epoch interval between checkpoints, or None.

  • tensorboard_dir (str | Path | None) – Directory for TensorBoard event files, or None.

  • trainer_config (Config | None) – Trainer configuration for training mode.

  • inferencer_config (Config | None) – Inferencer configuration for inference mode.

__init__(strategy_type, dataset, model_config, weight_init, weight_init_params, bias_init, checkpoint_dir, checkpoint_interval, tensorboard_dir, trainer_config=None, inferencer_config=None)[source]¶

Initialize the placeholder ensemble strategy.

setup_models()[source]¶

Raise because ensemble model setup is not implemented.

Raises:

NotImplementedError – Always.

Return type:

None

init_model_weights()[source]¶

Raise because ensemble weight initialization is not implemented.

Raises:

NotImplementedError – Always.

Return type:

None

set_state_dicts(state_dicts)[source]¶

Raise because ensemble state-dict loading is not implemented.

Parameters:

state_dicts (list[dict]) – State dictionaries that would be loaded into managed models.

Raises:

NotImplementedError – Always.

Return type:

None

setup_trainers(device)[source]¶

Raise because ensemble trainer setup is not implemented.

Parameters:

device (str | device) – Target device for training.

Raises:

NotImplementedError – Always.

Return type:

None

run_training()[source]¶

Raise because ensemble training is not implemented.

Return type:

list[Model]

Returns:

Never returns normally.

Raises:

NotImplementedError – Always.

setup_inferencers(device)[source]¶

Raise because ensemble inferencer setup is not implemented.

Parameters:

device (str | device) – Target device for inference.

Raises:

NotImplementedError – Always.

Return type:

None

run_inference(predictions_save_path)[source]¶

Raise because ensemble inference is not implemented.

Parameters:

predictions_save_path (str | Path | None) – Destination directory for prediction output.

Raises:

NotImplementedError – Always.

Return type:

None

property model_signature: Config¶

Raise because ensemble model signatures are not implemented.

Returns:

Never returns normally.

Raises:

NotImplementedError – Always.

property signature: Config¶

Return the placeholder ensemble strategy configuration.

Returns:

A Config containing the base strategy signature only.

class xanesnet.strategies.KFold(strategy_type, dataset, model_config, weight_init, weight_init_params, bias_init, checkpoint_dir, checkpoint_interval, tensorboard_dir, trainer_config=None, inferencer_config=None)[source]¶

Bases: Strategy

K-fold cross-validation strategy.

Note

Not yet implemented. TODO: implement k-fold data splitting and per-fold training.

Parameters:

  • strategy_type (str) – Strategy identifier.

  • dataset (Dataset) – Dataset used for training or inference.

  • model_config (Config) – Configuration for the model.

  • weight_init (str) – Weight initialization scheme name.

  • weight_init_params (Config) – Additional weight-initializer parameters.

  • bias_init (str) – Bias initialization scheme name.

  • checkpoint_dir (str | Path | None) – Directory for checkpoints, or None.

  • checkpoint_interval (int | None) – Epoch interval between checkpoints, or None.

  • tensorboard_dir (str | Path | None) – Directory for TensorBoard event files, or None.

  • trainer_config (Config | None) – Trainer configuration for training mode.

  • inferencer_config (Config | None) – Inferencer configuration for inference mode.

__init__(strategy_type, dataset, model_config, weight_init, weight_init_params, bias_init, checkpoint_dir, checkpoint_interval, tensorboard_dir, trainer_config=None, inferencer_config=None)[source]¶

Initialize the placeholder k-fold strategy.

setup_models()[source]¶

Raise because k-fold model setup is not implemented.

Raises:

NotImplementedError – Always.

Return type:

None

init_model_weights()[source]¶

Raise because k-fold weight initialization is not implemented.

Raises:

NotImplementedError – Always.

Return type:

None

set_state_dicts(state_dicts)[source]¶

Raise because k-fold state-dict loading is not implemented.

Parameters:

state_dicts (list[dict]) – State dictionaries that would be loaded into managed models.

Raises:

NotImplementedError – Always.

Return type:

None

setup_trainers(device)[source]¶

Raise because k-fold trainer setup is not implemented.

Parameters:

device (str | device) – Target device for training.

Raises:

NotImplementedError – Always.

Return type:

None

run_training()[source]¶

Raise because k-fold training is not implemented.

Return type:

list[Model]

Returns:

Never returns normally.

Raises:

NotImplementedError – Always.

setup_inferencers(device)[source]¶

Raise because k-fold inferencer setup is not implemented.

Parameters:

device (str | device) – Target device for inference.

Raises:

NotImplementedError – Always.

Return type:

None

run_inference(predictions_save_path)[source]¶

Raise because k-fold inference is not implemented.

Parameters:

predictions_save_path (str | Path | None) – Destination directory for prediction output.

Raises:

NotImplementedError – Always.

Return type:

None

property model_signature: Config¶

Raise because k-fold model signatures are not implemented.

Returns:

Never returns normally.

Raises:

NotImplementedError – Always.

property signature: Config¶

Return the placeholder k-fold strategy configuration.

Returns:

A Config containing the base strategy signature only.

class xanesnet.strategies.Single(strategy_type, dataset, model_config, weight_init, weight_init_params, bias_init, checkpoint_dir, checkpoint_interval, tensorboard_dir, trainer_config=None, inferencer_config=None)[source]¶

Bases: Strategy

Single-model training and inference strategy.

Trains or runs inference with exactly one model instance. This is the standard strategy for most XANESNET workflows.

Parameters:

  • strategy_type (str) – Registry key identifying this strategy type.

  • dataset (Dataset) – Dataset used for training or inference.

  • model_config (Config) – Configuration for the managed model.

  • weight_init (str) – Weight initialization scheme name.

  • weight_init_params (Config) – Additional parameters for the weight initializer.

  • bias_init (str) – Bias initialization scheme name.

  • checkpoint_dir (str | Path | None) – Directory for checkpoints, or None to disable checkpointing.

  • checkpoint_interval (int | None) – Epoch interval for checkpoint saves, or None to disable interval-based checkpointing.

  • tensorboard_dir (str | Path | None) – Directory for TensorBoard event files, or None to disable TensorBoard logging.

  • trainer_config (Config | None) – Trainer configuration used for training mode.

  • inferencer_config (Config | None) – Inferencer configuration used for inference mode.

__init__(strategy_type, dataset, model_config, weight_init, weight_init_params, bias_init, checkpoint_dir, checkpoint_interval, tensorboard_dir, trainer_config=None, inferencer_config=None)[source]¶

Initialize the single-model strategy.

setup_models()[source]¶

Instantiate a single model from model_config and store it as self.model.

Return type:

None

init_model_weights()[source]¶

Apply weight and bias initialization to self.model.

Return type:

None

set_state_dicts(state_dicts)[source]¶

Load model weights from the first entry of state_dicts.

Parameters:

state_dicts (list[dict]) – List of state dictionaries; only the first entry is used for the single model.

Raises:

ValueError – If setup_models has not been called.

Return type:

None

setup_trainers(device)[source]¶

Instantiate a trainer for self.model and store it as self.trainer.

Must be called after setup_models and setup_checkpointer.

Parameters:

device (str | device) – The device on which training will be performed.

Raises:

ValueError – If setup_models has not been called, trainer_config is None, or the checkpointer has not been set up.

Return type:

None

run_training()[source]¶

Run the training loop and return the trained model.

Must be called after setup_trainers.

Return type:

list[Model]

Returns:

A single-element list containing the trained model.

Raises:

ValueError – If setup_models or setup_trainers has not been called.

setup_inferencers(device)[source]¶

Instantiate an inferencer for self.model and store it as self.inferencer.

Must be called after setup_models.

Parameters:

device (str | device) – The device on which inference will be performed.

Raises:

ValueError – If setup_models has not been called or inferencer_config is None.

Return type:

None

run_inference(predictions_save_path)[source]¶

Run inference and optionally save predictions.

Must be called after setup_inferencers.

Parameters:

predictions_save_path (str | Path | None) – Directory in which to write prediction output, or None to skip saving.

Raises:

ValueError – If setup_inferencers has not been called.

Return type:

None

property model_signature: Config¶

Return self.model’s configuration signature.

Returns:

A Config representing the model’s signature.

Raises:

ValueError – If setup_models has not been called.

property signature: Config¶

Return the strategy configuration as a Config.

Returns:

A Config capturing the strategy and model configuration.

class xanesnet.strategies.StrategyRegistry[source]¶

Bases: object

Name-based registry for strategy classes.

classmethod register(name)[source]¶

Register a strategy class under name.

Parameters:

name (str) – Registry key. Matching is case-insensitive.

Return type:

Callable[[type[Strategy]], type[Strategy]]

Returns:

Decorator that registers and returns the class unchanged.

Raises:

KeyError – If name is already registered.

classmethod get(name)[source]¶

Return the strategy class registered as name.

Parameters:

name (str) – Registry key. Matching is case-insensitive.

Return type:

type[Strategy]

Returns:

Registered strategy class.

Raises:

KeyError – If no strategy is registered under name.

classmethod list()[source]¶

Return all registered strategy names.

Return type:

list[str]

Returns:

Registry keys in insertion order.

Submodules¶

xanesnet.strategies.base module¶

Abstract base class for XANESNET training and inference strategies.

class xanesnet.strategies.base.Strategy(strategy_type, dataset, model_config, weight_init, weight_init_params, bias_init, checkpoint_dir, checkpoint_interval, tensorboard_dir, trainer_config=None, inferencer_config=None)[source]¶

Bases: ABC

Abstract base class for training and inference strategies.

A strategy defines how one or more models are set up, trained, and used for inference (e.g. single model, ensemble, k-fold cross-validation). Subclasses must implement all abstract methods to provide concrete training and inference logic.

Raises:

  • ValueError – If neither trainer_config nor inferencer_config is provided at construction time.

  • ValueError – If both trainer_config and inferencer_config are None.

Parameters:

  • strategy_type (str) – Registry key identifying this strategy type.

  • dataset (Dataset) – The dataset used for training or inference.

  • model_config (Config) – Configuration for the model.

  • weight_init (str) – Weight initialization scheme name.

  • weight_init_params (Config) – Additional parameters passed to the weight initializer.

  • bias_init (str) – Bias initialization scheme name.

  • checkpoint_dir (str | Path | None) – Directory for saving checkpoint files, or None to disable checkpointing.

  • checkpoint_interval (int | None) – Number of epochs between checkpoints, or None to disable interval-based checkpointing.

  • tensorboard_dir (str | Path | None) – Directory for TensorBoard event files, or None to disable TensorBoard logging.

  • trainer_config (Config | None) – Configuration for the trainer. Either this or inferencer_config must be provided.

  • inferencer_config (Config | None) – Configuration for the inferencer. Either this or trainer_config must be provided.

__init__(strategy_type, dataset, model_config, weight_init, weight_init_params, bias_init, checkpoint_dir, checkpoint_interval, tensorboard_dir, trainer_config=None, inferencer_config=None)[source]¶

Initialize shared strategy state.

abstractmethod setup_models()[source]¶

Instantiate the models used by this strategy.

Must be called before init_model_weights, setup_trainers, or setup_inferencers.

Return type:

None

abstractmethod init_model_weights()[source]¶

Apply weight and bias initialization to the strategy’s models.

Must be called after setup_models.

Return type:

None

abstractmethod set_state_dicts(state_dicts)[source]¶

Load model state dicts from a list of previously saved dicts.

Parameters:

state_dicts (list[dict]) – List of state dictionaries, one per model managed by this strategy.

Return type:

None

abstractmethod setup_trainers(device)[source]¶

Instantiate the trainers used by this strategy.

Must be called after setup_models and setup_checkpointer.

Parameters:

device (str | device) – The device on which training will be performed (e.g. "cpu" or "cuda").

Return type:

None

abstractmethod run_training()[source]¶

Execute the training loop and return the trained models.

The base implementation logs the run start and returns an empty list. Subclasses must call super().run_training() and then return their trained models.

Return type:

list[Model]

Returns:

List of trained Model instances.

abstractmethod setup_inferencers(device)[source]¶

Instantiate the inferencers used by this strategy.

Must be called after setup_models.

Parameters:

device (str | device) – The device on which inference will be performed.

Return type:

None

abstractmethod run_inference(predictions_save_path)[source]¶

Execute inference and optionally save predictions.

The base implementation logs the run start. Subclasses must call super().run_inference(predictions_save_path).

Parameters:

predictions_save_path (str | Path | None) – Directory in which to write prediction output, or None to skip saving.

Return type:

None

setup_checkpointer()[source]¶

Instantiate the Checkpointer for this strategy.

Must be called after setup_models because the checkpointer is initialized with self.model_signature.

Return type:

None

abstract property model_signature: Config¶

Return the model’s configuration as a Config.

Returns:

A Config representing the model’s configuration signature.

abstract property signature: Config¶

Return the full strategy configuration as a Config.

The base implementation returns a Config containing only the strategy_type key. Subclasses should call super().signature and extend the result.

Returns:

A Config capturing the strategy configuration.

xanesnet.strategies.bootstrap module¶

Bootstrap ensemble strategy for XANESNET (placeholder).

class xanesnet.strategies.bootstrap.Bootstrap(strategy_type, dataset, model_config, weight_init, weight_init_params, bias_init, checkpoint_dir, checkpoint_interval, tensorboard_dir, trainer_config=None, inferencer_config=None)[source]¶

Bases: Strategy

Bootstrap ensemble strategy.

Note

Not yet implemented. TODO: implement bootstrap sampling for model ensembling.

Parameters:

  • strategy_type (str) – Strategy identifier.

  • dataset (Dataset) – Dataset used for training or inference.

  • model_config (Config) – Configuration for the model.

  • weight_init (str) – Weight initialization scheme name.

  • weight_init_params (Config) – Additional weight-initializer parameters.

  • bias_init (str) – Bias initialization scheme name.

  • checkpoint_dir (str | Path | None) – Directory for checkpoints, or None.

  • checkpoint_interval (int | None) – Epoch interval between checkpoints, or None.

  • tensorboard_dir (str | Path | None) – Directory for TensorBoard event files, or None.

  • trainer_config (Config | None) – Trainer configuration for training mode.

  • inferencer_config (Config | None) – Inferencer configuration for inference mode.

__init__(strategy_type, dataset, model_config, weight_init, weight_init_params, bias_init, checkpoint_dir, checkpoint_interval, tensorboard_dir, trainer_config=None, inferencer_config=None)[source]¶

Initialize the placeholder bootstrap strategy.

setup_models()[source]¶

Raise because bootstrap model setup is not implemented.

Raises:

NotImplementedError – Always.

Return type:

None

init_model_weights()[source]¶

Raise because bootstrap weight initialization is not implemented.

Raises:

NotImplementedError – Always.

Return type:

None

set_state_dicts(state_dicts)[source]¶

Raise because bootstrap state-dict loading is not implemented.

Parameters:

state_dicts (list[dict]) – State dictionaries that would be loaded into managed models.

Raises:

NotImplementedError – Always.

Return type:

None

setup_trainers(device)[source]¶

Raise because bootstrap trainer setup is not implemented.

Parameters:

device (str | device) – Target device for training.

Raises:

NotImplementedError – Always.

Return type:

None

run_training()[source]¶

Raise because bootstrap training is not implemented.

Return type:

list[Model]

Returns:

Never returns normally.

Raises:

NotImplementedError – Always.

setup_inferencers(device)[source]¶

Raise because bootstrap inferencer setup is not implemented.

Parameters:

device (str | device) – Target device for inference.

Raises:

NotImplementedError – Always.

Return type:

None

run_inference(predictions_save_path)[source]¶

Raise because bootstrap inference is not implemented.

Parameters:

predictions_save_path (str | Path | None) – Destination directory for prediction output.

Raises:

NotImplementedError – Always.

Return type:

None

property model_signature: Config¶

Raise because bootstrap model signatures are not implemented.

Returns:

Never returns normally.

Raises:

NotImplementedError – Always.

property signature: Config¶

Return the placeholder bootstrap strategy configuration.

Returns:

A Config containing the base strategy signature only.

xanesnet.strategies.ensemble module¶

Multi-model ensemble strategy for XANESNET (placeholder).

class xanesnet.strategies.ensemble.Ensemble(strategy_type, dataset, model_config, weight_init, weight_init_params, bias_init, checkpoint_dir, checkpoint_interval, tensorboard_dir, trainer_config=None, inferencer_config=None)[source]¶

Bases: Strategy

Multi-model ensemble strategy.

Note

Not yet implemented. TODO: implement ensemble training and averaged inference.

Parameters:

  • strategy_type (str) – Strategy identifier.

  • dataset (Dataset) – Dataset used for training or inference.

  • model_config (Config) – Configuration for the model.

  • weight_init (str) – Weight initialization scheme name.

  • weight_init_params (Config) – Additional weight-initializer parameters.

  • bias_init (str) – Bias initialization scheme name.

  • checkpoint_dir (str | Path | None) – Directory for checkpoints, or None.

  • checkpoint_interval (int | None) – Epoch interval between checkpoints, or None.

  • tensorboard_dir (str | Path | None) – Directory for TensorBoard event files, or None.

  • trainer_config (Config | None) – Trainer configuration for training mode.

  • inferencer_config (Config | None) – Inferencer configuration for inference mode.

__init__(strategy_type, dataset, model_config, weight_init, weight_init_params, bias_init, checkpoint_dir, checkpoint_interval, tensorboard_dir, trainer_config=None, inferencer_config=None)[source]¶

Initialize the placeholder ensemble strategy.

setup_models()[source]¶

Raise because ensemble model setup is not implemented.

Raises:

NotImplementedError – Always.

Return type:

None

init_model_weights()[source]¶

Raise because ensemble weight initialization is not implemented.

Raises:

NotImplementedError – Always.

Return type:

None

set_state_dicts(state_dicts)[source]¶

Raise because ensemble state-dict loading is not implemented.

Parameters:

state_dicts (list[dict]) – State dictionaries that would be loaded into managed models.

Raises:

NotImplementedError – Always.

Return type:

None

setup_trainers(device)[source]¶

Raise because ensemble trainer setup is not implemented.

Parameters:

device (str | device) – Target device for training.

Raises:

NotImplementedError – Always.

Return type:

None

run_training()[source]¶

Raise because ensemble training is not implemented.

Return type:

list[Model]

Returns:

Never returns normally.

Raises:

NotImplementedError – Always.

setup_inferencers(device)[source]¶

Raise because ensemble inferencer setup is not implemented.

Parameters:

device (str | device) – Target device for inference.

Raises:

NotImplementedError – Always.

Return type:

None

run_inference(predictions_save_path)[source]¶

Raise because ensemble inference is not implemented.

Parameters:

predictions_save_path (str | Path | None) – Destination directory for prediction output.

Raises:

NotImplementedError – Always.

Return type:

None

property model_signature: Config¶

Raise because ensemble model signatures are not implemented.

Returns:

Never returns normally.

Raises:

NotImplementedError – Always.

property signature: Config¶

Return the placeholder ensemble strategy configuration.

Returns:

A Config containing the base strategy signature only.

xanesnet.strategies.kfold module¶

K-fold cross-validation strategy for XANESNET (placeholder).

class xanesnet.strategies.kfold.KFold(strategy_type, dataset, model_config, weight_init, weight_init_params, bias_init, checkpoint_dir, checkpoint_interval, tensorboard_dir, trainer_config=None, inferencer_config=None)[source]¶

Bases: Strategy

K-fold cross-validation strategy.

Note

Not yet implemented. TODO: implement k-fold data splitting and per-fold training.

Parameters:

  • strategy_type (str) – Strategy identifier.

  • dataset (Dataset) – Dataset used for training or inference.

  • model_config (Config) – Configuration for the model.

  • weight_init (str) – Weight initialization scheme name.

  • weight_init_params (Config) – Additional weight-initializer parameters.

  • bias_init (str) – Bias initialization scheme name.

  • checkpoint_dir (str | Path | None) – Directory for checkpoints, or None.

  • checkpoint_interval (int | None) – Epoch interval between checkpoints, or None.

  • tensorboard_dir (str | Path | None) – Directory for TensorBoard event files, or None.

  • trainer_config (Config | None) – Trainer configuration for training mode.

  • inferencer_config (Config | None) – Inferencer configuration for inference mode.

__init__(strategy_type, dataset, model_config, weight_init, weight_init_params, bias_init, checkpoint_dir, checkpoint_interval, tensorboard_dir, trainer_config=None, inferencer_config=None)[source]¶

Initialize the placeholder k-fold strategy.

setup_models()[source]¶

Raise because k-fold model setup is not implemented.

Raises:

NotImplementedError – Always.

Return type:

None

init_model_weights()[source]¶

Raise because k-fold weight initialization is not implemented.

Raises:

NotImplementedError – Always.

Return type:

None

set_state_dicts(state_dicts)[source]¶

Raise because k-fold state-dict loading is not implemented.

Parameters:

state_dicts (list[dict]) – State dictionaries that would be loaded into managed models.

Raises:

NotImplementedError – Always.

Return type:

None

setup_trainers(device)[source]¶

Raise because k-fold trainer setup is not implemented.

Parameters:

device (str | device) – Target device for training.

Raises:

NotImplementedError – Always.

Return type:

None

run_training()[source]¶

Raise because k-fold training is not implemented.

Return type:

list[Model]

Returns:

Never returns normally.

Raises:

NotImplementedError – Always.

setup_inferencers(device)[source]¶

Raise because k-fold inferencer setup is not implemented.

Parameters:

device (str | device) – Target device for inference.

Raises:

NotImplementedError – Always.

Return type:

None

run_inference(predictions_save_path)[source]¶

Raise because k-fold inference is not implemented.

Parameters:

predictions_save_path (str | Path | None) – Destination directory for prediction output.

Raises:

NotImplementedError – Always.

Return type:

None

property model_signature: Config¶

Raise because k-fold model signatures are not implemented.

Returns:

Never returns normally.

Raises:

NotImplementedError – Always.

property signature: Config¶

Return the placeholder k-fold strategy configuration.

Returns:

A Config containing the base strategy signature only.

xanesnet.strategies.registry module¶

Registry for XANESNET strategy implementations.

class xanesnet.strategies.registry.StrategyRegistry[source]¶

Bases: object

Name-based registry for strategy classes.

classmethod register(name)[source]¶

Register a strategy class under name.

Parameters:

name (str) – Registry key. Matching is case-insensitive.

Return type:

Callable[[type[Strategy]], type[Strategy]]

Returns:

Decorator that registers and returns the class unchanged.

Raises:

KeyError – If name is already registered.

classmethod get(name)[source]¶

Return the strategy class registered as name.

Parameters:

name (str) – Registry key. Matching is case-insensitive.

Return type:

type[Strategy]

Returns:

Registered strategy class.

Raises:

KeyError – If no strategy is registered under name.

classmethod list()[source]¶

Return all registered strategy names.

Return type:

list[str]

Returns:

Registry keys in insertion order.

xanesnet.strategies.single module¶

Single-model training and inference strategy for XANESNET.

class xanesnet.strategies.single.Single(strategy_type, dataset, model_config, weight_init, weight_init_params, bias_init, checkpoint_dir, checkpoint_interval, tensorboard_dir, trainer_config=None, inferencer_config=None)[source]¶

Bases: Strategy

Single-model training and inference strategy.

Trains or runs inference with exactly one model instance. This is the standard strategy for most XANESNET workflows.

Parameters:

  • strategy_type (str) – Registry key identifying this strategy type.

  • dataset (Dataset) – Dataset used for training or inference.

  • model_config (Config) – Configuration for the managed model.

  • weight_init (str) – Weight initialization scheme name.

  • weight_init_params (Config) – Additional parameters for the weight initializer.

  • bias_init (str) – Bias initialization scheme name.

  • checkpoint_dir (str | Path | None) – Directory for checkpoints, or None to disable checkpointing.

  • checkpoint_interval (int | None) – Epoch interval for checkpoint saves, or None to disable interval-based checkpointing.

  • tensorboard_dir (str | Path | None) – Directory for TensorBoard event files, or None to disable TensorBoard logging.

  • trainer_config (Config | None) – Trainer configuration used for training mode.

  • inferencer_config (Config | None) – Inferencer configuration used for inference mode.

__init__(strategy_type, dataset, model_config, weight_init, weight_init_params, bias_init, checkpoint_dir, checkpoint_interval, tensorboard_dir, trainer_config=None, inferencer_config=None)[source]¶

Initialize the single-model strategy.

setup_models()[source]¶

Instantiate a single model from model_config and store it as self.model.

Return type:

None

init_model_weights()[source]¶

Apply weight and bias initialization to self.model.

Return type:

None

set_state_dicts(state_dicts)[source]¶

Load model weights from the first entry of state_dicts.

Parameters:

state_dicts (list[dict]) – List of state dictionaries; only the first entry is used for the single model.

Raises:

ValueError – If setup_models has not been called.

Return type:

None

setup_trainers(device)[source]¶

Instantiate a trainer for self.model and store it as self.trainer.

Must be called after setup_models and setup_checkpointer.

Parameters:

device (str | device) – The device on which training will be performed.

Raises:

ValueError – If setup_models has not been called, trainer_config is None, or the checkpointer has not been set up.

Return type:

None

run_training()[source]¶

Run the training loop and return the trained model.

Must be called after setup_trainers.

Return type:

list[Model]

Returns:

A single-element list containing the trained model.

Raises:

ValueError – If setup_models or setup_trainers has not been called.

setup_inferencers(device)[source]¶

Instantiate an inferencer for self.model and store it as self.inferencer.

Must be called after setup_models.

Parameters:

device (str | device) – The device on which inference will be performed.

Raises:

ValueError – If setup_models has not been called or inferencer_config is None.

Return type:

None

run_inference(predictions_save_path)[source]¶

Run inference and optionally save predictions.

Must be called after setup_inferencers.

Parameters:

predictions_save_path (str | Path | None) – Directory in which to write prediction output, or None to skip saving.

Raises:

ValueError – If setup_inferencers has not been called.

Return type:

None

property model_signature: Config¶

Return self.model’s configuration signature.

Returns:

A Config representing the model’s signature.

Raises:

ValueError – If setup_models has not been called.

property signature: Config¶

Return the strategy configuration as a Config.

Returns:

A Config capturing the strategy and model configuration.
